query: SELECT o.id, o.clienteNome, o.empresaId, o.criadoPor, u.nome as criadorNome, u.empresaId as userEmpresaId, u.role FROM orcamentos o LEFT JOIN internal_users u ON o.criadoPor = u.id ORDER BY o.id DESC LIMIT 10;
